title: Swizzels Original Drumstick Lollies, Milk & Raspberry Flavour Sweets - 3kg Bulk Bag Lollipops
features: Drumstick Lollie Delight: Relish the classic flavour of Swizzels Original Drumstick lollies. Let the luscious blend of milk and raspberry take you on a journey down memory lane.
Party-Perfect Sweet Treat: Elevate any event with these beloved delicious lollipops. Their universally adored taste adds joy to gatherings, making every moment sweeter.
Sweet Legacy: Embark on a journey through time as you taste the tradition of Swizzels, crafting these delicious lollipops since 1928, bringing happiness to generations.
Guilt-Free Lollies: Enjoy the classic yummy flavours without hesitation – these lollies are crafted without artificial colours and are gluten-free, making them a guilt-free treat.
Bulk Bag of Fun: Elevate your sweet game with a 3kg bulk bag of Drumstick lollipops. The ideal size for crafting party bags and spreading the joy of these classic sweets.
description: Product Description Contains raspberry and milk flavoured Drumstick Lollies Ingredients Ingredients: Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Vegetable Oils (Palm, Palm Kemel), Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Flavourings, Emulsifier: Glycerol Mono Stearate; Lysed Soya Protein, Colour: Anthocyanin. Directions Ready to eat. Box Contains Each Box Contains 1 x Bag of World Famous Brand Sweets Manufacturer Contact Information Swizzels Matlow Ltd., Carlton House, Albion Road, New Mills, High Peak, Derbyshire SK22 3HA.
